# Signal Scout - Prediction Market Alerts App

## About
Signal Scout is a mobile app for Kalshi prediction market enthusiasts. It delivers real-time alerts, curated market discovery, and personalized notifications so you never miss a move on the markets that matter to you.

## Platform
- iOS (iPhone & iPad)
- Available on the App Store

## Key Features
- **Smart Alerts**: Get notified instantly when prediction markets move based on your custom criteria.
- **Market Discovery**: Browse and filter Kalshi markets by category, volume, and trending activity.
- **Personalized Watchlists**: Follow the markets you care about and receive tailored updates.

## How It Works
1. Download Signal Scout from the App Store.
2. Set up alerts for the Kalshi markets you want to track.
3. Receive real-time push notifications when your conditions are met.

## Target Audience
- Prediction market traders and enthusiasts
- Kalshi users who want faster market intelligence
- Anyone interested in tracking real-world event outcomes
